description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a wide, rounded shoulder leading up to a conical cap. The bottle is made of translucent orange plastic, allowing some visibility of the contents inside. The cap is a solid, opaque orange and appears to be a screw-on type, providing a secure closure. The front of the bottle features bold white text, including the brand name 'Natura KAIAX' and product details such as 'body splash 200ml'. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, reflecting light softly. There are no visible decorative graphics or patterns aside from the printed text and logo.
description: A tall, cylindrical orange shampoo bottle with a conical cap and bold white branding on the front. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no decorative graphics.
description_view_0: The rear or side of the bottle is visible, showing the smooth, uninterrupted orange surface and the conical cap.
description_view_1: The front view displays the white 'Natura KAIAX' branding and product details clearly on the bottle's surface.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, with a partial glimpse of the label text wrapping around the bottle.
description_view_3: The back of the bottle is shown, featuring a plain orange surface with no visible text or graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: Natura logo with stylized flower emblem
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a gently tapered neck and rounded shoulders
